perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up shot of three Chiikawa-themed character daruma coin banks inside their retail packaging, stacked on a shelf. (2) Transitions to a young woman standing outdoors at night, speaking directly into the camera with very expressive facial movements and hand gestures. (3) A screen recording of the Foodomo mobile app is shown, demonstrating how to search for 7-Eleven store locations and navigate to the gift box section. (4) Returns to the woman outdoors; she points excitedly at the camera and then at a shopping bag she is holding, which contains the items. (5) The video ends with a close-up of a blue Hachiware character bank being held up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Starts with a high-pitched, excited female scream and a bubbly anime-style sound effect, immediately followed by upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop background music. (2) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a high-pitched, energetic, and rapid tone, explaining the utility of an app. (3) Sound effects like 'dings' and UI clicks are heard over the music during the app demonstration. (4) The music continues at a steady volume as the female speaker narratively describes finding the items hidden in a store. (5) The music fades out as the video concludes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我買到啦！！！' (I bought it!!!) appears in large, colorful decorative font at the top. (2) Functional text '各位一定要用 foodomo' (Everyone must use foodomo) and 'FOODOMO超級好用' appear to emphasize the recommendation. (3) Instructional text '首先挑選要查詢的門市' (First select the store to check) and '按到禮盒專區' (Press to gift box area) guides the viewer through the app. (4) '吉伊卡哇系列！！' (Chiikawa series!!) appears with a joyful tone. (5) '影片結尾要抽出小八款' (Will give away Hachiware version at end) acts as a hook for engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> App Tutorial -> Success Storytelling -> Giveaway Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing as the main host throughout the vlog sections.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with brown hair and bangs, wearing a grey turtleneck and a white fuzzy outer coat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A nighttime urban street with warm building lights and a parked car; interspersed with digital screen recordings of a mobile app interface.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural night street lighting and mobile screen backlight.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an promotional tutorial and unboxing vlog. It aims to inform viewers how to acquire limited-edition Chiikawa merchandise at 7-Eleven using the Foodomo app's stock checking feature. The creator uses her personal success story to validate the method and encourages audience engagement through a giveaway of the featured items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation and step-by-step visual tutorial of the app's functionality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy 'best friend' conversational style with prominent variety-show text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes 'FOMO' (fear of missing out) by focusing on popular character merchandise and providing a 'hack' to find them, which is a high-performing content strategy for social media clustering.
